sections.paragraph:
χρηματίζω [χρῆμα]

—1. from an earlier use of χ. in sense of deliberation or negotiation in political or financial matters develops the sense of giving oracular information: in NT through various channels, ‘impart a divine message’

—a. of good news, pass. be revealed, prophesied Lk 2:26.

—b. w. focus on strict instruction enjoin, warn, act. Hb 12:25; pass. Mt 2:12, 22; Ac 10:22; Hb 8:5, 11:7.

—2. ‘take/bear a name or title’, go by the name (of), in Engl. idiomatic pass. be called/named Ac 11:26; Ro 7:3.
